title: Manga Up! Global Adds Hinomiya's Welcome to the Yandere Cafe, More Manga in English
content: Image courtesy of Manga Up! GlobalManga UP! Global added Hinomiya's Welcome to the Yandere Cafe (Yandere Cafe e Yōkoso) manga in English on Saturday. It added Hiroumi Aoi's The Beast King Ouma Reconquers the World (Kemono no Ō Ma no Sekai Reconquest) manga in English on Tuesday.Manga UP!
author: ANN

title: Kingdom Manga Gets 2nd Stage Play from August
content: TOHO revealed on Monday that Yasuhisa Hara's Kingdom manga is getting a second stage play adaptation titled Kingdom II -Keishō- (Kingdom II -Inheritance-). The new stage play will run in August-September in Tokyo, in Osaka in September, and in Fukuoka in October.
author: ANN

title: The World Standard/Wasuta Girl Group to End Activities
content: Image via The World Standard group's X/Twitter account©AvexJapanese girl group The World Standard (nicknamed Wasuta) announced on Friday that the group will end activities with its final live performance scheduled this winter.
author: ANN

title: WEBTOON Launches AI-Powered Localization Tools for Canvas Platform
content: Image via Webtoon Entertainment's website© WEBTOON EntertainmentWEBTOON Entertainment announced on March 26 plans to introduce AI-powered localization tools as part of a unified global CANVAS platform, set to launch in spring 2026.

title: LINE Gains Control of Kakao Games Following Stake Acquisition
content: Image via Google Play's website© Line MangaLINE Yahoo!, the parent company of LINE Manga, has become the largest shareholder of Kakao Games following a recent stake acquisition, marking a shift in the company's ownership structure.Kakao Games CEO Sang-woo Han said on March 26 that no specific management changes or…

title: The Year We Turned 29 Webtoon Confirmed for Live-Action Series
content: Image via Naver Webtoon's website© Naver WebtoonA live-action adaptation of the webtoon The Year We Turned 29 is moving forward, with production confirmed and development underway.According to Korean newspaper Munhwa Ilbo on March 24, Artist Studio has finalized plans to produce the series based on the webtoon and is…
